/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/federated.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/federated.dir/src/db.cpp.o CMakeFiles/federated.dir/src/schema_detect.cpp.o CMakeFiles/federated.dir/src/contract.cpp.o CMakeFiles/federated.dir/src/aggregate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/federated.dir/src/serialize.cpp.o CMakeFiles/federated.dir/src/json_aggregator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/federated.dir/src/adapters/schema_a.cpp.o CMakeFiles/federated.dir/src/adapters/schema_b.cpp.o CMakeFiles/federated.dir/src/adapters/schema_c.cpp.o -o federated  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib -lpq /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi_cxx.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi.so
